reviews.review_text:
1000% recommend Courtney! She is so personable, very passionate about her work, quick, super friendly, and so knowledgeable on products for maintaining your hairstyle!
I have been looking for a permanent hair braiding stylist since I moved here 3 years ago! She’s the one!
Honestly told her to do whatever she thought best n she really went above my hair isn’t to heavy, it’s cute n so soft I can function with it as well.
Courtney is absolutely amazing. She left me looking right & is super friendly. She made sure I was good and offered me snacks & drinks. Definitely recommend & will be back again :)
Thanks Courtney!! I’ll be seeing you again

reviews.review_text: Tatiana welcomed me in, had great vibes, good conversations, and made me feel comfortable. She’s a jack of all trades! My lashes look AMAZING! I’m excited to try different styles in the future. 10/10 experience. BOOK HER NOW!

Had an amazing experience after a disappointing visit to another stylist. The first stylist charged the same price for a takedown but didn’t include a wash/blow-dry, leaving me frustrated and panicked. Thankfully, Tatiana came to the rescue and completely turned things around! She was personable, thoughtful, and attentive. She even asked if I wanted water or music to make me feel comfortable. Although she was running behind, she sent me a text ahead of time. She took her time to do things right.

My lashes lasted three weeks before I needed a refill. Tatiana made sure I knew how to wash and care for my lashes. She followed up with me which is top notch customer service ! I love the way my lashes look classic with some flare.
Tatiana was really awesome! I definitely will be going back and would highly recommend her.

reviews.review_text: Quin did an amazing job on my long knotless braids and got them done very quickly! It only took her a little less than 4 hours and she also kindly did them for me super crazy last minute which I can't thank her enough for!! She saved the day for me!
Sequina, was amazing from start to finish. On time, quick, and she was easy on my edges. Super sweet and I fell asleep, which I only do if someone has “healing hands”. ????

Sequina is an exceptional home-based stylist. She made me feel welcome and comfortable throughout my visit. Her expertise in retwisting my locs and restoring their strength was impressive. I highly recommend her services. Thank you, Sequina, for the fantastic haircare experience!
Sequina was super kind & professional. Highly recommend

reviews.review_text: Tatiana welcomed me in, had great vibes, good conversations, and made me feel comfortable. She’s a jack of all trades! My lashes look AMAZING! I’m excited to try different styles in the future. 10/10 experience. BOOK HER NOW!

Had an amazing experience after a disappointing visit to another stylist. The first stylist charged the same price for a takedown but didn’t include a wash/blow-dry, leaving me frustrated and panicked. Thankfully, Tatiana came to the rescue and completely turned things around! She was personable, thoughtful, and attentive. She even asked if I wanted water or music to make me feel comfortable. Although she was running behind, she sent me a text ahead of time. She took her time to do things right.

My lashes lasted three weeks before I needed a refill. Tatiana made sure I knew how to wash and care for my lashes. She followed up with me which is top notch customer service ! I love the way my lashes look classic with some flare.
Tatiana was really awesome! I definitely will be going back and would highly recommend her.

reviews.review_text: Quin did an amazing job on my long knotless braids and got them done very quickly! It only took her a little less than 4 hours and she also kindly did them for me super crazy last minute which I can't thank her enough for!! She saved the day for me!
Sequina, was amazing from start to finish. On time, quick, and she was easy on my edges. Super sweet and I fell asleep, which I only do if someone has “healing hands”. ????

Sequina is an exceptional home-based stylist. She made me feel welcome and comfortable throughout my visit. Her expertise in retwisting my locs and restoring their strength was impressive. I highly recommend her services. Thank you, Sequina, for the fantastic haircare experience!
Sequina was super kind & professional. Highly recommend

Festival Hair: Edgy and high-volume styles like bubble braids or high-attitude, intricate designs tailored for music festivals or concerts.
